name: pdf-prd-summary
description: User attaches a PRD PDF. Agent extracts findings and creates 3 issues via manage_issues.

toolCalls.name: manage_issues
toolCalls.arguments: {"issues":[{"id":"ISS-201","title":"PRD: Add SAML SSO for enterprise customers","description":"Required by 3 enterprise prospects. Coordinate with infra on IdP plumbing.","status":"Backlog","priority":"High","assignee":"Jordan","labels":["prd","enterprise","auth"]},{"id":"ISS-202","title":"PRD: Org-level usage dashboard","description":"Admins want a single view of usage by user and team.","status":"Backlog","priority":"Med","assignee":"Sarah","labels":["prd","dashboard"]},{"id":"ISS-203","title":"PRD: SCIM provisioning","description":"Follow-on after SAML. Lower urgency.","status":"Backlog","priority":"Low","assignee":"Alex","labels":["prd","enterprise"]}]}

response.content: I read the PRD and created 3 new issues in the Backlog: SAML SSO (high priority), an org-level usage dashboard (medium), and SCIM provisioning (low). I assigned them based on previous ownership patterns. Want me to estimate scope on any of them?
